# 线段树分裂(指针版)

```cpp
struct Node{
	Node *ls,*rs;
	int cnt;
	Node(int x=0,Node *ls=nullptr,Node *rs=nullptr):ls(ls),rs(rs){
		cnt=0;
	}
};
// 哨兵节点
Node *nullNode=new Node();
Node* newNode(int x=0){
	return new Node(x,nullNode,nullNode);
}
#define ls(x) (x->ls)
#define rs(x) (x->rs)
#define cnt(x) (x->cnt)
void pushup(Node* p){
	cnt(p)=cnt(ls(p))+cnt(rs(p));
}
Node* merge(Node *&p,Node *&q,int l,int r){
	if(p==nullNode)return q;
	if(q==nullNode)return p;
	if(l==r){
		cnt(p)+=cnt(q);
		delete q;
		return p;
	}
	int mid=l+r>>1;
	ls(p)=merge(ls(p),ls(q),l,mid);
	rs(p)=merge(rs(p),rs(q),mid+1,r);
	pushup(p);
	delete q;
	return p;
}
void insert(Node *&p,int l,int r,int x,int y){
	if(p==nullNode)p=newNode();
	if(l==r){
		cnt(p)+=y;
		return;
	}
	int mid=l+r>>1;
	if(x<=mid)insert(ls(p),l,mid,x,y);
	else insert(rs(p),mid+1,r,x,y);
	pushup(p);
}
void split(Node *&p,Node *&q,int l,int r,int ql,int qr){
	if(l>qr||r<ql||p==nullNode)return;
	if(ql<=l&&r<=qr){
		q=p;
		p=nullNode;
		return;
	}
	if(q==nullNode)q=newNode();
	int mid=l+r>>1;
	if(ql<=mid)split(ls(p),ls(q),l,mid,ql,qr);
	if(qr>mid)split(rs(p),rs(q),mid+1,r,ql,qr);
	pushup(p);
	pushup(q);
}
int query(Node *p,int l,int r,int ql,int qr){
	if(p==nullNode)return 0;
	if(ql<=l&&r<=qr)return cnt(p);
	int mid=l+r>>1,res=0;
	if(ql<=mid)res+=query(ls(p),l,mid,ql,qr);
	if(qr>mid)res+=query(rs(p),mid+1,r,ql,qr);
	return res;
}
int kth(Node *p,int l,int r,int k){
	if(l==r)return l;
	int mid=l+r>>1;
	if(cnt(ls(p))>=k)return kth(ls(p),l,mid,k);
	return kth(rs(p),mid+1,r,k-cnt(ls(p)));
}
void solve(){
	int n,m;
	cin>>n>>m;
	vector<Node*> root={newNode(),newNode()};
	for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){
		int x;
		cin>>x;
		insert(root[1],1,n,i,x);
	}
	while(m--){
		int op,p,x,y,t;
		cin>>op;
		if(op==0){//从可重集p分裂出[x,y]
			cin>>p>>x>>y;
			root.push_back(newNode());
			split(root[p],root.back(),1,n,x,y);
		}	
		else if(op==1){// 可重集p+=t,t=0
			cin>>p>>t;
			root[p]=merge(root[p],root[t],1,n);
			root[t]=nullNode;
		}
		else if(op==2){// 插入x个y到p
			cin>>p>>x>>y;
			insert(root[p],1,n,y,x);
		}
		else if(op==3){// 询问p中[x,y]的个数
			cin>>p>>x>>y;
			cout<<query(root[p],1,n,x,y)<<"\n";
		}
		else{// 询问p的kth
			cin>>p>>x;
			if(cnt(root[p])<x){
				cout<<"-1\n";
				continue;
			}
			cout<<kth(root[p],1,n,x)<<"\n";
		}
	}
}
```
